articles.title: Sinner's 20-Match Win Streak: He's Chasing Tennis History!
articles.summary: Jannik Sinner won his 20th match in a row at the Madrid Open, beating Cameron Norrie. He's now tied with Novak Djokovic for the best start to a season in Masters 1000 history. Can he keep the streak alive?

articles.title: Swimming Star Teagan O'Dell Is Taking Her Talents to Virginia!
articles.summary: NCAA finalist Teagan O'Dell is transferring from Cal to Virginia after a stellar freshman season. She scored big at the championships and even earned Freshman of the Year honors. Now she's joining a team that's won six straight national titles!

articles.title: The $500 Super Shoe That Helped Break a World Record!
articles.summary: Adidas just released the Adizero Adios Pro Evo 3, a super-light racing shoe that weighs less than 100 grams. It helped Sabastian Sawe run a marathon in under two hours! But is it worth the hefty price tag?
